<cmd>cat << 'EOF' > /tmp/sdpbrowse.c
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <bluetooth/bluetooth.h>
#include <bluetooth/sdp.h>
#include <bluetooth/sdp_lib.h>

int main() {
    bdaddr_t target;
    sdp_session_t *session;
    sdp_list_t *response_list = NULL, *search_list, *attrid_list;
    uuid_t svc_uuid;
    uint32_t range = 0x0000ffff;
    
    str2ba("20:50:E7:6F:D6:A1", &target);
    
    session = sdp_connect(BDADDR_ANY, &target, SDP_RETRY_IF_BUSY);
    if (!session) {
        perror("sdp_connect failed");
        return 1;
    }
    
    sdp_uuid16_create(&svc_uuid, PUBLIC_BROWSE_GROUP);
    search_list = sdp_list_append(NULL, &svc_uuid);
    attrid_list = sdp_list_append(NULL, &range);
    
    if (sdp_service_search_attr_req(session, search_list, SDP_ATTR_REQ_RANGE, attrid_list, &response_list) == 0) {
        sdp_list_t *r = response_list;
        for (; r; r = r->next) {
            sdp_record_t *rec = (sdp_record_t*)r->data;
            sdp_list_t *proto_list;
            printf("Service Record Handle: 0x%x\n", rec->handle);
            
            sdp_uuid_t svc;
            if (sdp_get_service_classes(rec, &proto_list) == 0) {
                sdp_list_t *p = proto_list;
                for (; p; p = p->next) {
                    char uuid_str[256];
                    sdp_uuid2strn((uuid_t*)p->data, uuid_str, sizeof(uuid_str));
                    printf("  Service UUID: %s\n", uuid_str);
                }
                sdp_list_free(proto_list, free);
            }
        }
    } else {
        perror("sdp_service_search_attr_req");
    }
    
    sdp_close(session);
    return 0;
}
EOF
gcc -o /tmp/sdpbrowse /tmp/sdpbrowse.c -lbluetooth && sudo /tmp/sdpbrowse</cmd>

<cmd>cat << 'EOF' > /tmp/sdpbrowse2.c
#include <stdio.h>
#include <bluetooth/bluetooth.h>
#include <bluetooth/sdp.h>
#include <bluetooth/sdp_lib.h>

int main() {
    bdaddr_t target;
    sdp_session_t *session;
    sdp_list_t *response_list = NULL, *search_list, *attrid_list;
    uuid_t svc_uuid;
    uint32_t range = 0x0000ffff;
    
    str2ba("20:50:E7:6F:D6:A1", &target);
    session = sdp_connect(BDADDR_ANY, &target, SDP_RETRY_IF_BUSY);
    if (!session) { perror("sdp_connect"); return 1; }
    
    sdp_uuid16_create(&svc_uuid, PUBLIC_BROWSE_GROUP);
    search_list = sdp_list_append(NULL, &svc_uuid);
    attrid_list = sdp_list_append(NULL, &range);
    
    int err = sdp_service_search_attr_req(session, search_list, SDP_ATTR_REQ_RANGE, attrid_list, &response_list);
    if (err == 0) {
        for (sdp_list_t *r = response_list; r; r = r->next) {
            sdp_record_t *rec = (sdp_record_t*)r->data;
            printf("Handle: 0x%x\n", rec->handle);
            sdp_list_t *proto_list;
            if (sdp_get_service_classes(rec, &proto_list) == 0) {
                for (sdp_list_t *p = proto_list; p; p = p->next) {
                    char buf[256];
                    sdp_uuid2strn((uuid_t*)p->data, buf, sizeof(buf));
                    printf("  UUID: %s\n", buf);
                }
            }
        }
    } else perror("search");
    sdp_close(session);
    return 0;
}
EOF

for psm in [1, 3, 5, 7, 17, 25]:
    try:
        s = socket.socket(socket.AF_BLUETOOTH, socket.SOCK_SEQPACKET, socket.BTPROTO_L2CAP)
        s.settimeout(3)
        s.connect(('20:50:E7:6F:D6:A1', psm))
        print(f'PSM {psm}: OPEN')
        s.close()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'PSM {psm}: {e}')
"
</cmd>

log.content:
<cmd>cat << 'EOF' > /tmp/sdpbrowse.c
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <bluetooth/bluetooth.h>
#include <bluetooth/sdp.h>
#include <bluetooth/sdp_lib.h>

int main() {
    bdaddr_t target;
    sdp_session_t *session;
    sdp_list_t *response_list = NULL, *search_list, *attrid_list;
    uuid_t svc_uuid;
    uint32_t range = 0x0000ffff;
    
    str2ba("20:50:E7:6F:D6:A1", &target);
    
    session = sdp_connect(BDADDR_ANY, &target, SDP_RETRY_IF_BUSY);
    if (!session) {
        perror("sdp_connect failed");
        return 1;
    }
    
    sdp_uuid16_create(&svc_uuid, PUBLIC_BROWSE_GROUP);
    search_list = sdp_list_append(NULL, &svc_uuid);
    attrid_list = sdp_list_append(NULL, &range);
    
    if (sdp_service_search_attr_req(session, search_list, SDP_ATTR_REQ_RANGE, attrid_list, &response_list) == 0) {
        sdp_list_t *r = response_list;
        for (; r; r = r->next) {
            sdp_record_t *rec = (sdp_record_t*)r->data;
            sdp_list_t *proto_list;
            printf("Service Record Handle: 0x%x\n", rec->handle);
            
            sdp_uuid_t svc;
            if (sdp_get_service_classes(rec, &proto_list) == 0) {
                sdp_list_t *p = proto_list;
                for (; p; p = p->next) {
                    char uuid_str[256];
                    sdp_uuid2strn((uuid_t*)p->data, uuid_str, sizeof(uuid_str));
                    printf("  Service UUID: %s\n", uuid_str);
                }
                sdp_list_free(proto_list, free);
            }
        }
    } else {
        perror("sdp_service_search_attr_req");
    }
    
    sdp_close(session);
    return 0;
}
EOF
gcc -o /tmp/sdpbrowse /tmp/sdpbrowse.c -lbluetooth && sudo /tmp/sdpbrowse</cmd>
<cmd>sed -i 's/sdp_uuid_t svc;//' /tmp/sdpbrowse.c && gcc -o /tmp/sdpbrowse /tmp/sdpbrowse.c -lbluetooth && sudo timeout 15 /tmp/sdpbrowse</cmd>

<cmd>cat << 'EOF' > /tmp/sdpbrowse2.c
#include <stdio.h>
#include <bluetooth/bluetooth.h>
#include <bluetooth/sdp.h>
#include <bluetooth/sdp_lib.h>

int main() {
    bdaddr_t target;
    sdp_session_t *session;
    sdp_list_t *response_list = NULL, *search_list, *attrid_list;
    uuid_t svc_uuid;
    uint32_t range = 0x0000ffff;
    
    str2ba("20:50:E7:6F:D6:A1", &target);
    session = sdp_connect(BDADDR_ANY, &target, SDP_RETRY_IF_BUSY);
    if (!session) { perror("sdp_connect"); return 1; }
    
    sdp_uuid16_create(&svc_uuid, PUBLIC_BROWSE_GROUP);
    search_list = sdp_list_append(NULL, &svc_uuid);
    attrid_list = sdp_list_append(NULL, &range);
    
    int err = sdp_service_search_attr_req(session, search_list, SDP_ATTR_REQ_RANGE, attrid_list, &response_list);
    if (err == 0) {
        for (sdp_list_t *r = response_list; r; r = r->next) {
            sdp_record_t *rec = (sdp_record_t*)r->data;
            printf("Handle: 0x%x\n", rec->handle);
            sdp_list_t *proto_list;
            if (sdp_get_service_classes(rec, &proto_list) == 0) {
                for (sdp_list_t *p = proto_list; p; p = p->next) {
                    char buf[256];
                    sdp_uuid2strn((uuid_t*)p->data, buf, sizeof(buf));
                    printf("  UUID: %s\n", buf);
                }
            }
        }
    } else perror("search");
    sdp_close(session);
    return 0;
}
EOF
gcc -o /tmp/sdpbrowse2 /tmp/sdpbrowse2.c -lbluetooth 2>&1 && echo "Compiled OK"</cmd>
